{# contacts.html — Vendor contacts tab with CRUD (add/edit/delete) and click-to-call. Receives: contacts (list[VendorContact]), vendor (VendorCard). Called by: vendor_tab_partial route (tab=="contacts") in htmx_views.py. Depends on: contact_row.html partial, HTMX, Alpine.js, brand palette. #}
{# ── Add Contact Form ──────────────────────────────────── #}

Contacts ({{ contacts|length }})

{# ── Contacts Table ────────────────────────────────────── #} {% if contacts %}
{% for c in contacts %} {% include "htmx/partials/vendors/tabs/contact_row.html" %} {% endfor %}
Name Title Email Phone Interactions Actions
{% else %}

No contacts found for this vendor.

Click "+ Add Contact" above or use "Find Contacts" to discover contacts via AI.

{% endif %}
